overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk-themed video game, showing a walk through a futuristic urban pedestrian boulevard, entering a 'Real Meat' restaurant, and continuing down the street. Features high-fidelity ray-traced graphics with modern glass architecture, palm trees, and neon signage.

events.description: approaching and entering the Real Meat restaurant entrance from the pedestrian walkway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered pedestrian boulevard toward the Real Meat restaurant entrance

notable_agents.action: two pedestrians standing and conversing on the sidewalk near the building entrance
child in colorful clothing running past on the right side of the walkway

entered.detail: elevated covered walkway with glass and steel structure connecting buildings overhead
large illuminated orange sign with 'REAL MEAT' text above restaurant entrance
tall palm trees in planters lining the right side of the pedestrian street
modern glass facade building with reflective windows and metallic frames
outdoor dining area with white benches and red velvet ropes along the walkway

segments.scene_description: Walking along a futuristic covered pedestrian boulevard with palm trees and modern glass buildings. The camera approaches the 'Real Meat' restaurant entrance, passing pedestrians conversing on the left. The walkway features white tiled pavement and outdoor seating areas roped off with red barriers.

scene_state.functional_zone: modern restaurant interior with digital advertising displays

events.description: entering the Real Meat restaurant from the bright outdoor walkway into the dimly lit interior
moving deeper into the restaurant where lighting becomes darker with neon accent illumination
approaching the glass exit doors at the rear of the restaurant to return outside

agents.ego_description: entering the restaurant and walking through the interior dining area past seated patrons and digital menu displays toward the back exit

notable_agents.action: patron in neon green jacket sitting on leather couch using a handheld device
restaurant staff member or patron standing near the bar counter area

entered.detail: illuminated digital screens displaying menu items above the bar area
long dark bar counter with stools and digital displays behind it
modern white leather couches and dark wooden coffee tables in the seating area
tall vertical digital screens displaying advertisements and media content
large glass doors at the rear of the restaurant leading back to the street

segments.scene_description: Inside the Real Meat restaurant, the environment shifts to a dimly lit interior with polished marble floors and modern lounge furniture. Digital advertising screens and menu boards illuminate the space. The camera moves past patrons seated on leather couches and approaches the glass exit doors at the rear of the establishment.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic boulevard with outdoor restaurant patios and elevated walkways

events.description: exiting the restaurant back onto the pedestrian boulevard with outdoor seating areas
discovering a body lying prone on the walkway ahead in the distance

agents.ego_description: exiting the restaurant and continuing down the futuristic boulevard past outdoor lounge areas toward a figure lying on the ground

notable_agents.action: person reclining on white outdoor lounge furniture using a device
body lying face down on the pavement wearing yellow clothing

entered.detail: white cushioned lounge chairs and low tables arranged on the patio outside the restaurant
futuristic cars parked along the right side of the pedestrian street
elevated glass and steel walkway connecting buildings across the boulevard
large digital screens mounted on building facades displaying colorful advertisements

segments.scene_description: Exiting the restaurant back onto the covered pedestrian boulevard, the scene reveals outdoor lounge areas with white furniture where patrons relax. The camera continues walking past parked futuristic vehicles and digital billboards, approaching a body lying on the walkway ahead under the elevated pedestrian bridges.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a bright, futuristic pedestrian boulevard through the dim interior of a restaurant and back into the urban street. It begins by gliding along a white-tiled walkway lined with palm trees and glass architecture, passing conversing pedestrians and red-roped seating areas toward the entrance of the Real Meat restaurant. As the camera crosses the threshold, the environment shifts into a dimly lit interior characterized by polished marble floors, leather lounge furniture, and glowing digital menu boards. The scene then transitions back outdoors through glass exit doors, revealing white lounge furniture and relaxing patrons under the covered boulevard. Finally, the camera moves past parked futuristic vehicles and digital billboards, continuing forward toward a body lying on the walkway beneath elevated pedestrian bridges.
